description.value:
Prerequisite: Blinkstrike +3 class ability, Quick Draw, Dodge, Mobility, Agile Riposte.

Benefit: As a free action, you may upgrade your Blinkstrike stance for one round. While upgraded, you lose your Blinkstrike bonus to Defense, but gain a bonus to attack and damage equal to half your Blinkstrike level, rounded up. In addition, you may make a Full Attack and still move up to your speed (you may tumble normally or use Blink Step as part of this move), though you must move at least 5 ft. between each attack, and you cannot move to a square you have previ- ously occupied that turn. These bonuses only apply while you are in the Blinkstrike stance.
